description: A gamified interactive post that invites followers to screenshot their screen and share their results, combining luck-based gameplay with product promotion and branded hashtag participation.
structural_recipe: 1) Present an on-screen game mechanic (e.g., spinning wheel, tapping element, random selector) 2) Instruct followers to screenshot their result 3) Ask a direct question linking their screenshot result to product preference (e.g., 'Did you get your favorite drink?') 4) Include brand hashtags and emotional call-to-action emojis 5) Frame as luck-based to encourage repeat attempts and sharing
why_it_works: Saudis engage strongly with interactive, participatory content that creates shareable moments. Gamification taps into entertainment value while luck-based mechanics drive FOMO and repeat engagement. Asking users to screenshot and tag creates user-generated content amplification and social proof within their networks.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure game mechanics comply with local regulations around gambling-adjacent mechanics
Customize product associations to local preferences (e.g., coffee vs. beverages)
Brand hashtags must align with campaign strategy to track participation
Gaming mechanics should load quickly on mobile-first audiences with varying connection speeds
